stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Flying within the clouds shown in the figure above is likely to cause to which of the following?

options.a: Light to moderate turbulence and light to moderate icing.
options.b: Light to moderate turbulence and severe icing.
options.c: Moderate to heavy turbulence and light icing.
options.d: Moderate to severe turbulence and moderate to severe icing.
